positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a celestial animal (like a lunar fox or starry panther) standing amongst nebulae and geometric constellations. The style should be neo-art deco mixed with mystical watercolor textures, featuring bold, clean silhouettes and intricate, linework details. Use a restricted color palette of deep indigo, cosmic teal, glowing gold, and matte black. The composition must be centralized, designed for repeat printing on apparel, featuring high contrast and a dramatic, ethereal glow. The artwork must look perfectly suitable for a textile print, with clean edges and solid color areas for printing.
negative: blurry, low detail, jpeg artifacts, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, asymmetrical, disfigured, bad anatomy, extra limbs, solid color, photo, realistic photography
